Bash(cd /c/Users/nadin/OneDrive/Documents/NOVA/PRA && python3 << 'EOF'
import os

# Check glossary files
glossary_path = "PRA Glossary/json/"
glossary_files = [f for f in os.listdir\(glossary_path\) if f.startswith\("glossary-"\) and f.endswith\(".json"\)]
glossary_files = sorted\(glossary_files\)

# Extract letter/number
letters = [f.replace\("glossary-", ""\).replace\(".json", ""\) for f in glossary_files]
print\("Glossary coverage:"\)
print\(f"Files found: {letters}"\)

# Check which letters from A-Z are present
alphabet = [chr\(i\) for i in range\(ord\('a'\), ord\('z'\) + 1\)]
missing = [letter for letter in alphabet if letter not in letters]
present = [letter for letter in letters if len\(letter\) == 1]

print\(f"\\nA-Z coverage: {len\(present\)}/26 letters"\)
if missing:
    print\(f"Missing letters: {missing}"\)
else:
    print\("All A-Z letters present"\)

print\(f"\\nSpecial files \(non-letter\): {[l for l in letters if len\(l\) > 1]}"\)
EOF)

Bash(cd /c/Users/nadin/OneDrive/Documents/NOVA/PRA && python3 << 'EOF'
# Count total legal instruments
years_data = [
    \(2013, 36\), \(2014, 27\), \(2015, 101\), \(2016, 51\), \(2017, 43\), \(2018, 25\), 
    \(2019, 23\), \(2020, 29\), \(2021, 23\), \(2022, 10\), \(2023, 18\), \(2024, 16\), 
    \(2025, 31\), \(2026, 4\), \('Unknown', 957\)
]

total = sum\(count for _, count in years_data\)
by_year = sum\(count for year, count in years_data if isinstance\(year, int\)\)

print\("Legal Instruments by Year:"\)
for year, count in years_data:
    print\(f"  {year}: {count}"\)
print\(f"\\nTotal from years \(2013-2026\): {by_year}"\)
print\(f"Total with Unknown: {total}"\)
print\(f"\\nNote: Unknown file contains {957} instruments \(reason unknown from metadata\)"\)

# Glossary stats
glossary_terms = [
    \('A', 67\), \('B', 21\), \('C', 87\), \('D', 29\), \('E', 32\), \('F', 39\), \('G', 23\),
    \('H', 7\), \('I', 58\), \('J', 2\), \('K', 2\), \('L', 30\), \('M', 46\), \('N', 23\),
    \('O', 23\), \('P', 54\), \('Q', 5\), \('R', 56\), \('S', 74\), \('T', 37\), \('U', 28\),
    \('V', 1\), \('W', 10\), \('Z', 1\)
]

print\("\\n\\nGlossary Terms by Letter:"\)
sum_terms = 0
for letter, count in glossary_terms:
    print\(f"  {letter}: {count}"\)
    sum_terms += count

print\(f"\\nSum from A-Z \(except X, Y\): {sum_terms}"\)
print\(f"Complete file metadata reports: 756"\)
print\(f"Difference: {756 - sum_terms}"\)
EOF)

Bash(cd "/c/Users/nadin/OneDrive/Documents/NOVA/PRA" && python3 -c "
import json

with open\('PRA Forms/json/pra-forms-structured.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

# Find all form titles that have missing spaces \(a letter/number immediately followed by uppercase letter without space\)
import re
issues = []
for i, form in enumerate\(data.get\('forms', data.get\('instruments', []\)\)\):
    title = form.get\('title', ''\)
    # Pattern: lowercase/digit immediately followed by uppercase \(no space\)
    # Or roman numeral \(I, V, X\) immediately followed by uppercase letter
    if re.search\(r'[a-z0-9][A-Z]', title\) or re.search\(r'\(Chapter \\d+\)\([A-Z]\)', title\) or re.search\(r'\(Annex [IVXLCDM]+\)\([A-Z]\)', title\):
        issues.append\(\(i, title\)\)

print\(f'Found {len\(issues\)} titles with potential spacing issues:'\)
for idx, title in issues[:30]:
    print\(f'  [{idx}] {title}'\)
if len\(issues\) > 30:
    print\(f'  ... and {len\(issues\)-30} more'\)
")

    data = json.load\(f\)

# Show some tricky cases with download URLs for context

tricky = [f for f in forms if 'Annex V' in f['title'] and 'NSTRUCT' in f['title']]

    print\(f\\"URL: {form['download_url']}\\"\)
    print\(\)
")

Bash(cd "/c/Users/nadin/OneDrive/Documents/NOVA/PRA" && python3 -c "
import json, re

with open\('PRA Forms/json/pra-forms-structured.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

# Check a wider sample of Annex patterns
forms = data.get\('forms', []\)
annex_forms = [f for f in forms if f['title'].startswith\('Annex'\)]
# Show unique prefix patterns
seen = set\(\)
for form in annex_forms:
    title = form['title']
    # Extract everything up to first lowercase letter or first space after roman
    m = re.match\(r'\(Annex\\s+[IVXLCDM]+\(?:\\s*\\u2013\\s*Chapter\\s*\\d+\)?\)\(.*\)', title\)
    if m:
        prefix = m.group\(1\)
        rest = m.group\(2\)
        if rest and rest[0] not in \(' ', ':', '\\u2013'\) and prefix not in seen:
            seen.add\(prefix\)
            print\(f'Prefix: [{prefix}] Rest: [{rest[:50]}]'\)
print\(f'\\nTotal unique annex prefixes with spacing issues: {len\(seen\)}'\)
")

Bash(cd "/c/Users/nadin/OneDrive/Documents/NOVA/PRA/PRA Rules/json" && python3 -c "
import json
with open\('_rule-change-timelines.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    a = json.load\(f\)
with open\('_rule_change_timelines.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    b = json.load\(f\)
print\(f'Hyphen version: title={a.get\(\\"metadata\\",{}\).get\(\\"title\\"\)}, keys={len\(a\)}'\)
print\(f'Underscore version: title={b.get\(\\"metadata\\",{}\).get\(\\"title\\"\)}, keys={len\(b\)}'\)
print\(f'Hyphen total_rules: {a.get\(\\"metadata\\",{}\).get\(\\"total_rules\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'Underscore total_rules: {b.get\(\\"metadata\\",{}\).get\(\\"total_rules\\"\)}'\)
# Check if timelines overlap
h_timelines = set\(a.get\('timelines', {}\).keys\(\)\)
u_timelines = set\(b.get\('timelines', {}\).keys\(\)\)
print\(f'Hyphen timeline entries: {len\(h_timelines\)}'\)
print\(f'Underscore timeline entries: {len\(u_timelines\)}'\)
print\(f'Overlap: {len\(h_timelines & u_timelines\)}'\)
")
